hero.subtext: Nord Axis Tech bridges traditional industry and tomorrow's digital frontier — combining AI, robotics, sustainable energy and human-centric engineering into one integrated platform.

services.title: Industrial Intelligence
services.description: AI models and data science pipelines tailored for industrial environments — from predictive analytics to real-time decision engines.

services.title: Maintenance 4.0→5.0
services.description: IoT-connected condition monitoring and cobot-assisted maintenance workflows that eliminate unplanned downtime.

services.title: Engineering & Automation
services.description: Full-stack robotics integration, digital twin modelling, and smart production line design for the factory of the future.

services.title: Sustainable Energy
services.description: Energy 2.0 audit, renewable integration, and real-time ESG monitoring to meet compliance targets and cut operational costs.

why_items.title: Integrated Approach
why_items.description: Software and hardware in one house. We design, build, and maintain the full stack — no integration gaps.

why_items.title: Sustainability by Design
why_items.description: Energy 2.0 principles baked into every solution. ESG compliance is not an add-on — it's the foundation.

why_items.title: Future-Proof Architecture
why_items.description: Built for Industry 5.0 today. Modular, scalable systems that grow as your operation evolves.

training_teaser.label: Training Programs
training_teaser.title: KNOWLEDGE IS YOUR COMPETITIVE EDGE
training_teaser.b2b_desc: Bespoke AI, automation, and predictive maintenance training programs designed for industrial teams.
training_teaser.b2c_desc: Self-paced and instructor-led programs to launch or accelerate your career in Industry 4.0.

cta_banner.quote: Navigating the Nexus of Industry and Intelligence.
cta_banner.sub: Your partner in sustainable industrial transformation
